context_note: Ecuador vs Curaçao, WC2026. Ecuador MASSIVE favorite: λ_ECU=2.612, λ_CUR=0.416. FTR: Ecuador 86.59%, Draw 9.76%, Curaçao 3.77%. This is a GER-CUR/BRA-HAI level mismatch. RULE7 applies (>86% favorite). RULE8 does NOT fire (draw=9.76%). Blowout-script likely: Curaçao will chase from early. Player SOT markets NOT YET POPULATED (no prices). Q10 Bacuna is CUR's key midfielder (Cardiff City); mild RULE15 applies (blowout reversal partially offsets). Q6 Sarmiento is ECU attacking winger (Benfica); NO RULE15 (ECU expected winner). Most corners: ECU 85.12% dominant. Cards: CUR gets more cards as defensive underdog (CUR 53.17% most cards).

Player_SOT.note: PLAYER MARKETS NOT YET POPULATED — no prices available at time of research

rules_applied.RULE7_heavy_favorite: Ecuador 86.59% → RULE7 applies. All 'Curaçao does something attacking' props lean NO. Crowd will over-credit CUR.
rules_applied.NO_RULE8: Draw=9.76% well below 25% threshold. Blowout-script match expected (like BRA-HAI).
rules_applied.Q10_Bacuna_mild_RULE15: CUR win=3.77% → blowout territory. Bacuna is CUR's key midfielder (NOT primary striker like Nazon). Full RULE15 (-10pp) moderated: blowout reversal pattern (CUR will push forward from early deficit) + Bacuna not pure forward → apply mild RULE15 (-5pp). Base from model (λ_CUR_SOT=2.05, Bacuna 28% share → λ_Bacuna=0.574, P(≥1)=0.437). With -5pp → 0.39.
rules_applied.Q6_no_RULE15_Sarmiento: Ecuador is expected winner (86.59%). Sarmiento is ECU's attacking winger. No RULE15. Estimate from model (ECU SOT 2H share ≈13-15%).
rules_applied.Q2_fouls_reverse: Q2 asks if ECU fouls MORE than CUR — this is the REVERSE of the expected pattern. CUR as defensive underdog fouls more. Cards proxy: CUR most cards 53.17% vs ECU 23.32%. For fouls: P(ECU more fouls) ≈ 0.25-0.30. Strong NO lean.
rules_applied.Q4_compound: Q4 = P(ECU scores first goal) × P(CUR scores in 2H). P(ECU first) = λ_ECU/(λ_ECU+λ_CUR) × P(≥1 goal) = 0.863 × 0.951 = 0.821. P(CUR in 2H) = 0.2084. Combined ≈ 0.171.
rules_applied.Q5_pen_or_red: P(penalty OR red) = 1 - P(no pen) × P(no red) = 1 - 0.670 × 0.826 = 0.446. Slight independence assumption.
rules_applied.Q1_both_SOT_HT: No direct 1H BTTS SOT market. Model: λ_ECU_SOT_1H=3.44 → P(ECU≥1)=0.968. λ_CUR_SOT_1H=0.86 → P(CUR≥1)=0.578. Combined=0.560. CUR SOT OU1.5 Over=0.601 confirms they DO get shots despite being outclassed.
rules_applied.direct_markets: Q3=highest scoring half 2H(0.459); Q7=FTR ECU(0.866); Q8=OU2.5 Over(0.612); Q9=ECU_corners_OU4_5 Over(0.759).

Q1_both_SOT_at_HT.note: Model: λ_CUR_SOT_1H=0.86 → P(CUR≥1 SOT in 1H)=0.578. λ_ECU_SOT_1H=3.44 → P(ECU≥1)=0.968. P(both)=0.560. CUR_SOT_OU1.5 Over=0.601 confirms CUR still gets shots despite being outclassed. Round up slightly → 0.56.

Q2_ECU_more_fouls.note: CUR is the defensive underdog who fouls more. Cards proxy: CUR most cards 53.17% vs ECU 23.32%. Cards handicap: CUR>ECU on cards = 51.82%. For fouls, the pattern is even stronger (defensive fouling without yellow cards). P(ECU more fouls) ≈ 0.25-0.30. Strong NO lean → 0.28.

Q3_2H_more_goals_than_1H.note: DIRECT highest scoring half market: Second Half = 0.4594. Trust the market.

Q4_ECU_first_AND_CUR_2H_goal.note: Compound question. P(ECU first goal) = λ_ECU/(λ_ECU+λ_CUR) × P(≥1 goal) = 0.863 × 0.951 = 0.821. P(CUR scores in 2H) = 0.2084 (direct 2H CUR OU0.5 market). P(Q4) ≈ 0.821 × 0.2084 = 0.171. Approximate independence assumption valid since CUR's 2H scoring is unlikely regardless of who scores first.

Q5_penalty_or_red_card.note: P(pen)=0.3298, P(red)=0.1736. Using independence: P(OR) = 1-(1-0.3298)(1-0.1736) = 0.446. Both markets are liquid. Round to 0.44.

Q6_Sarmiento_SOT_2H.note: NO PLAYER MARKET AVAILABLE. Model: λ_ECU_SOT_2H=4.14. Sarmiento as one of 4-5 ECU attacking options → ~13-15% SOT share. λ_Sarmiento_2H=0.55-0.62 → P(≥1)=0.42-0.46. No RULE15 (ECU expected winner). LOW confidence without direct market. Estimate 0.40.

Q7_ECU_wins.note: RULE1: FTR market ECU = 0.8659 (liquid). avg(crowd~0.87, market 0.866) ≈ 0.87. RULE6: don't push to 1.00.

Q8_3plus_goals.note: DIRECT OU2.5 Over = 0.6118. Trust the market.

Q9_ECU_5plus_corners.note: DIRECT ECU_corners_OU4_5 Over = 0.7587. Trust the market. Most corners ECU=85.12% confirms dominance.

Q10_Bacuna_SOT.note: NO PLAYER MARKET AVAILABLE. Model: λ_CUR_SOT=2.05. Bacuna as key CUR midfielder (~28% share) → λ_Bacuna=0.574, P(≥1)=0.437. Mild RULE15: CUR 3.77% win (blowout territory), but Bacuna is midfielder NOT striker AND blowout reversal pattern (CUR pushes forward desperately) partially offsets RULE15. Net: -5pp → 0.39 → 0.38. LOW confidence without direct market. MUST update when player markets populate.

match_facts.notable: MASSIVE UPSET: Ecuador 86.59% favorite drew 0-0 with Curaçao. ECU 15 SOT 27 shots 0 goals. CUW 5 YC (massive disciplinary issues). Curaçao 0 corners.

Q1_both_SOT_at_HT.notes: outcome=NO — CUW had 0 SOT in 1H (all 3 CUW SOT were in 2H). Beat crowd because tied estimates.

Q2_ECU_more_fouls.notes: CUW 10 fouls > ECU 7. outcome=NO. Big beat crowd.

Q5_penalty_or_red_card.notes: No red cards, no penalty. outcome=NO. MISS (we estimated higher than crowd).

Q6_Sarmiento_SOT_2H_NOT_IN_QK.notes: NOT A QK QUESTION — Sarmiento SOT was not on the platform for this match.

Q7_ECU_wins.notes: ECU 0-0 draw. MASSIVE UPSET. outcome=NO. Both us and crowd badly missed. We were worse (0.87 vs crowd 0.80).

Q10_Bacuna_SOT.notes: CUW 3 total SOT. Bacuna got 1 SOT. outcome=YES.

post_match_results.note: Only 9 questions on QK platform. Q6 Sarmiento SOT was NOT a QK question. ECU wins = QK Q6, 3+ goals = QK Q7, ECU 5+ corners = QK Q8, Bacuna SOT = QK Q9.
